parameters.jsCode: function uuidv4(){return "xxxxxxxx-xxxx-4xxx-yxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx".replace(/[xy]/g,c=>{const r=Math.random()*16|0;return(c==="x"?r:(r&0x3|0x8)).toString(16);})}const runId=uuidv4();return[{json:{content_type:"trending_news",duration:45,run_id:runId}}];

parameters.command: ={{ 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && python -c "from processors.planner import Planner; import json; p = Planner(); print(json.dumps(p.run()))" | tee /tmp/step0_out.txt && python3 -m pipeline.save_state ' + $json.run_id + ' /tmp/step0_out.txt' }}

={{ 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && echo ' + JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify({topic: ($json.proposed_topic || ''), type: ($json.proposed_content_type || ''), angle: ($json.proposed_angle || ''), visual_hook: ($json.visual_hook || ''), games: (($json.game_slugs || []).join(', ')), duration: String($json.estimated_duration_seconds || 0) + 's', cost: String($json.estimated_cost_units || 0) + ' units', reasoning: ($json.reasoning || ''), budget: ($json.budget_status || '')})) + ' > /tmp/gate_data.json && python -m pipeline.gate_helper --gate 0 --data-file /tmp/gate_data.json --run-id ' + $json.run_id }}

={{ 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && eval $(python3 -m pipeline.read_state ' + $('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.run_id + ') && python -m pipeline.step1_scrape_news --source all --topic "$PROPOSED_TOPIC" --games "$GAME_SLUGS" --run-id ' + $('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.run_id + ' | tee /tmp/step1_out.txt && python3 -m pipeline.save_state ' + $('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.run_id + ' /tmp/step1_out.txt' }}

={{ 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && eval $(python3 -m pipeline.read_state ' + $('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.run_id + ') && python -m pipeline.step2_generate_script --type "$PROPOSED_CONTENT_TYPE" --duration "$ESTIMATED_DURATION_SECONDS" --topic "$PROPOSED_TOPIC" --angle "$PROPOSED_ANGLE" --visual-hook "$VISUAL_HOOK" --run-id ' + $('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.run_id + ' | tee /tmp/step2_out.txt && python3 -m pipeline.save_state ' + $('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.run_id + ' /tmp/step2_out.txt' }}

={{ 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && python -m pipeline.step3_validate_script --script-id ' + $json.script_id + ' --run-id ' + $json.run_id + ' | tee /tmp/step3_out.txt && python3 -m pipeline.save_state ' + $json.run_id + ' /tmp/step3_out.txt' }}

={{ (() => {  const overall = ($json.overall_score || 0);  const hook = (($json.scores || {}).hook_strength || $json.hook_score || 0);  const verified = ($json.verified_score || (($json.scores || {}).accuracy || 0));  if (!$json.approved) {    return 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && echo '      + JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify({ status: 'skipped_low_quality', overall_score: overall, hook_score: hook, verified_score: verified }))      + ' > /tmp/gate2_skip.json';  }  const scriptText = ($('Parse Script').first().json.script_text || '').substring(0, 3000);  const data = {    Score: String(overall) + '/100',    Hook_Score: String(hook) + '/100',    Verified_Score: String(verified) + '/100',    script_body: scriptText  };  const cmd = 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && echo '    + JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify(data))    + ' > /tmp/gate_data.json && python -m pipeline.gate_helper --gate 2 --data-file /tmp/gate_data.json --run-id '    + $json.run_id;  return cmd;})() }}

={{ 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && eval $(python3 -m pipeline.read_state ' + $('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.run_id + ') && python -m pipeline.step4_generate_voiceover --script-id $SCRIPT_ID | tee /tmp/step4_out.txt && python3 -m pipeline.save_state ' + $('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.run_id + ' /tmp/step4_out.txt' }}

={{ 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && echo ' + JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify({duration: String($json.duration || 0) + 's', file_path: ($json.file_path || '')})) + ' > /tmp/gate_data.json && python -m pipeline.gate_helper --gate 3 --data-file /tmp/gate_data.json --run-id ' + $json.run_id }}

={{ 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && eval $(python3 -m pipeline.read_state ' + $('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.run_id + ') && python -m pipeline.step5_publish_reels --script-id $SCRIPT_ID | tee /tmp/step5_pub_out.txt && python3 -m pipeline.save_state ' + $('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.run_id + ' /tmp/step5_pub_out.txt' }}
={{ 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && eval $(python3 -m pipeline.read_state ' + $('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.run_id + ') && python -m pipeline.step6_update_rag --script-id $SCRIPT_ID' }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { success: true, message: '✅ Instagram pipeline complete.' } }];

parameters.command: ={{ 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && python -m pipeline.update_gate_post --post-id ' + ($('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.post_id || 'none') + ' --gate ' + String($('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.gate || 0) + ' --action approve --user ' + JSON.stringify($('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.user_name || '') }}

={{ 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && python -m pipeline.update_gate_post --post-id ' + ($json.post_id || 'none') + ' --gate ' + String($json.gate || 0) + ' --action reject --user ' + JSON.stringify($json.user_name || '') }}

={{ 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && python -m pipeline.comment_handler --run-id ' + ($json.run_id || 'unknown') + ' --gate ' + String($json.gate || 0) + ' --comment ' + JSON.stringify($json.comment || 'no comment') }}

={{ (() => {  const data = {    caption: ($json.caption || '').substring(0, 2000),    hashtags: ($json.hashtags || '').substring(0, 500)  };  const cmd = 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && echo '    + JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify(data))    + ' > /tmp/gate_data.json && python -m pipeline.gate_helper --gate 4 --data-file /tmp/gate_data.json --run-id '    + $json.run_id;  return cmd;})() }}

={{ 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && eval $(python3 -m pipeline.read_state ' + $('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.run_id + ') && python -m pipeline.step5b_buffer_draft --script-id $SCRIPT_ID --caption "$CAPTION" --hashtags "$HASHTAGS" | tee /tmp/step5b_out.txt && python3 -m pipeline.save_state ' + $('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.run_id + ' /tmp/step5b_out.txt' }}

={{ (() => { const d = $json; const data = { Score: String(d.overall_score || 0) + '/100', Hook_Score: String(d.hook_score || 0) + '/100', Verified_Score: String(d.verified_score || 0) + '/100', script_body: (d.script_text || '').substring(0, 3000) }; return 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && echo ' + JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify(data)) + ' > /tmp/gate_data.json && python -m pipeline.gate_helper --gate 2 --data-file /tmp/gate_data.json --run-id ' + (d.run_id || ''); })() }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { status: 'comment_rewrite_failed', message: 'Generation failed - notification already sent.' } }];
return [{ json: { status: 'comment_stored' } }];

parameters.command: ={{ 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && python -m pipeline.step2_write_script --run-id ' + $json.run_id + ' --fresh | tee /tmp/step2_retry_out.txt && python3 -m pipeline.save_state ' + $json.run_id + ' /tmp/step2_retry_out.txt' }}

={{ 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && python -m pipeline.step3_validate_script --script-id ' + $json.script_id + ' --run-id ' + $json.run_id + ' | tee /tmp/step3_retry_out.txt && python3 -m pipeline.save_state ' + $json.run_id + ' /tmp/step3_retry_out.txt' }}

={{ (() => { const overall = ($json.overall_score || 0); const hook = (($json.scores || {}).hook_strength || $json.hook_score || 0); const verified = ($json.verified_score || (($json.scores || {}).accuracy || 0)); const scriptText = ($('Parse Retry Script').first().json.script_text || '').substring(0, 3000); const data = { Score: String(overall) + '/100', Hook_Score: String(hook) + '/100', Verified_Score: String(verified) + '/100', script_body: scriptText }; return 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && echo ' + JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify(data)) + ' > /tmp/gate_data.json && python -m pipeline.gate_helper --gate 2 --data-file /tmp/gate_data.json --run-id ' + $json.run_id; })() }}

={{ 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && echo ' + JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify({duration: String($json.duration || 0) + 's', size: String($json.file_size_mb || 0) + 'MB', resolution: ($json.resolution || ''), output_path: ($json.output_path || '')})) + ' > /tmp/gate_data.json && python -m pipeline.gate_helper --gate 5 --data-file /tmp/gate_data.json --run-id ' + $json.run_id }}

={{ 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && echo ' + JSON.stringify('{"platform": "Instagram"}') + ' > /tmp/gate_data.json && python -m pipeline.gate_helper --gate 6 --data-file /tmp/gate_data.json --run-id ' + $('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.run_id }}
